mapper.insert: INSERT INTO integration_daily_report ( project_id, report_date, site_name, location_str, worker_count, equip_count, overall_progress, task_snapshot, equip_snapshot, worker_snapshot, danger_snapshot, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{reportDate}::date, #{siteName}, #{locationStr}, #{workerCount}, #{equipCount}, #{overallProgress}, #{taskSnapshot}, #{equipSnapshot}, #{workerSnapshot}, #{dangerSnapshot}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (project_id, report_date) DO UPDATE SET site_name = EXCLUDED.site_name, location_str = EXCLUDED.location_str, worker_count = EXCLUDED.worker_count, equip_count = EXCLUDED.equip_count, overall_progress = EXCLUDED.overall_progress, task_snapshot = EXCLUDED.task_snapshot, equip_snapshot = EXCLUDED.equip_snapshot, worker_snapshot = EXCLUDED.worker_snapshot, danger_snapshot = EXCLUDED.danger_snapshot, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS "projectId", TO_CHAR(report_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "reportDate", site_name AS "siteName", location_str AS "locationStr", worker_count AS "workerCount", equip_count AS "equipCount", overall_progress AS "overallProgress", task_snapshot AS "taskSnapshot", equip_snapshot AS "equipSnapshot", worker_snapshot AS "workerSnapshot", danger_snapshot AS "dangerSnapshot", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "updatedAt" FROM integration_daily_report WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND report_date = #{reportDate}::date
SELECT TO_CHAR(report_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM integration_daily_report WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 90

SELECT overall_progress AS "overallProgress", task_snapshot AS "taskSnapshot", TO_CHAR(report_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "reportDate" FROM integration_daily_report WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND report_date < #{reportDate}::date ORDER BY report_date DESC LIMIT 1
